tables.name: airlines
tables.description: Airline companies with identification codes and operational status. Contains 247 airlines worldwide.

columns.name: active
columns.description: Whether the airline is currently active. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Y' (active) or 'N' (inactive/defunct).

columns.name: callsign
columns.description: Radio callsign used by the airline for air traffic control communications. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'HELIPISTAS', 'MERCHANT', 'EASTWEST'.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country where the airline is registered or headquartered. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Spain', 'Nigeria', 'Australia', 'Georgia', 'Mexico'.

columns.name: iata
columns.description: Two-letter IATA airline designator code. Type: TEXT. May be empty for some airlines. Examples: 'AA', 'UA'.

columns.name: icao
columns.description: Three-letter ICAO airline designator code. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'HLP', 'MXX', 'EWA', 'GGZ', 'SZT'.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Full official name of the airline. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Helipistas', 'Merchant Express Aviation', 'East-West Airlines'.

tables.name: airports
tables.description: Airport locations worldwide with geographic coordinates and identification codes. Contains 261 airports.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City where the airport is located. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Mbuji-mayi', 'Eberswalde', 'Nha Trang'.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country where the airport is located. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Congo (Kinshasa)', 'Germany', 'Ireland', 'Iceland', 'Vietnam'.

columns.name: elevation
columns.description: Airport elevation above sea level in feet. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '2221', '121', '24', '16', '40'.

columns.name: iata
columns.description: Three-letter IATA airport code. Type: TEXT. May be 'NULL' for some airports. Examples: 'MJM', 'IOR', 'VPN', 'CXR'.

columns.name: icao
columns.description: Four-letter ICAO airport code. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'FZWA', 'EDAV', 'EIIM', 'BIVO', 'VVCR'.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Full official name of the airport. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Mbuji Mayi Airport', 'Inishmore Aerodrome', 'Cam Ranh Airport'.

columns.name: x
columns.description: Longitude coordinate of the airport in decimal degrees. Type: TEXT. Positive=East, Negative=West. Examples: '23.569', '-9.654', '109.219'.

columns.name: y
columns.description: Latitude coordinate of the airport in decimal degrees. Type: TEXT. Positive=North, Negative=South. Examples: '-6.121', '52.827', '65.721'.

tables.name: routes
tables.description: Flight routes connecting airports operated by airlines, with source and destination details. Contains 2493 routes.

columns.name: airline
columns.description: IATA or ICAO code of the airline operating this route. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'S' (US Airways), 'K' (KLM), 'GS', 'ZB'.

columns.name: airline_name
columns.description: Full name of the airline operating this route. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'US Airways', 'KLM Royal Dutch Airlines', 'Air Foyle'.

columns.name: codeshare
columns.description: Whether the route is a codeshare arrangement. Type: TEXT. Values: 'None' (not codeshare) or codeshare indicator.

columns.name: dst_ap
columns.description: IATA code of the destination airport. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'PH' (Philadelphia), 'DMM', 'SYX'.

columns.name: dst_ap_country
columns.description: Country of the destination airport. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'United States', 'Saudi Arabia', 'China', 'Spain'.

columns.name: dst_ap_name
columns.description: Full name of the destination airport. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Philadelphia International Airport', 'King Fahd International Airport'.

columns.name: src_ap
columns.description: IATA code of the source (origin) airport. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'AMS' (Amsterdam), 'TS', 'BHX', 'GDX'.

columns.name: src_ap_country
columns.description: Country of the source airport. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Netherlands', 'China', 'United Kingdom', 'Russia'.

columns.name: src_ap_name
columns.description: Full name of the source (origin) airport. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Amsterdam Airport Schiphol', 'Birmingham International Airport'.
